source.name: Lab 3.1: Step-by-Step: Creating an Action
source.instructions:
To pass this assessment, you must have created the file at the correct location:

• Check 1: level2/actions/ folder exists.
• Check 2: level2/actions/action_bank_hours.py exists (the file you created and pasted the code into).
source.guidance: The grader checks that level2/actions/ exists and that action_bank_hours.py is present there. Create the actions folder inside level2 if needed, then create action_bank_hours.py in that folder and paste the code from Lab 3.1.
